---
title: "Tiago Verissimo"
subtitle: "*Mathematician, Programmer, and Educator*"
image: profile.png
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: reddit
      text: Reddit
      href: https://reddit.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
---

Welcome to my mathematics blog! I am a mathematician, programmer, and educator passionate about making mathematical concepts visual, intuitive, and accessible. 

Here, you'll find explorations in pure and applied mathematics, statistics, and programming. My goal is to bridge the gap between rigorous proof and intuitive visualization.

## Education

**University of Lisbon** | Lisbon, Portugal  
*M.S. in Mathematics & Data Science* | 2024 - 2026

**University of Coimbra** | Coimbra, Portugal  
*B.S. in Mathematics* | 2021 - 2024
